cases.prompt: 이 릴리즈 노트 AI 티 너무 나는데 자연스럽게 고쳐줘. 사람이 쓴 것처럼.

assertions.text: The agent detects LLM tells such as em-dashes, 'leverage', 'robust', and 3-bullet syndrome.
The agent rewrites the release notes in a human voice.
The agent produces a tagged diff showing the changes.

cases.prompt: Run a voice audit on README.md — too much 'leverage' and 'robust' and em-dashes everywhere.

assertions.text: The agent flags the 'leverage', 'robust', and em-dash usages in README.md.
The agent produces a per-project STYLE.md alongside the rewrite.
The agent produces a tagged diff of the rewritten text.
